title: Strategic Partner Manager- Mandarin & Japanese Speaker
description:
Salt is hiring a ‘Strategic Partner Manager’ to support two partnership scopes based in Singapore; Business Messaging partnerships for Greater China Region (GCR) and Commerce partnerships for Japan, focused on scaling the commerce ecosystem and partner GTM across the family of apps.

This role is hands-on and execution-oriented: you will enable partners, drive go-to-market outcomes, manage escalations, and translate partner/market insights into internal actions. You will work closely with internal Partner Managers and cross-functional teams (Product, Engineering, Ops, Programs) to deliver partner success and ecosystem growth.

This is a 8-month contract role based in Singapore.

Key Responsibilities

Partner Management & GTM Execution

  • Support Partner Managers to develop and execute GTM plans with prioritized partners to drive adoption and growth across messaging and commerce solutions.
  • Drive disciplined business planning and execution tracking (e.g., pipeline/deal tracking, milestones, partner plans, follow-ups).
  • Provide ongoing partner education and enablement on the various products/programs, especially solutions leveraging APIs and advanced integrations.

Partner Integration & Enablement (Messaging + Commerce)

  • Facilitate partner onboarding and integration readiness, including training, product/process enablement, and handling partner inquiries.
  • Help partners understand how to operationalize the different solutions, including program requirements and internal workflows needed to launch and scale.

Issue Management / Escalations

  • Track, triage, and resolve partner escalations efficiently by coordinating with internal teams (Product, Engineering, Ops).
  • Maintain clear escalation documentation and timelines; ensure partners receive consistent updates and closure.

Ecosystem Growth & Opportunity Mapping

  • Support ecosystem expansion by identifying, qualifying, and onboarding new partners (as needed), with focus on scalable impact.
  • Map ecosystem dynamics and identify opportunities/trends relevant to commerce and messaging partners (inputs into strategy and prioritization).

Partner/Market Insights -- Internal Influence

  • Collect partner feedback and market insights; synthesize and communicate actionable recommendations to influence product improvements and roadmap discussions.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally to translate partner needs into requirements, solutions, and execution plans.

Program & Operational Support

  • Support operational activities tied to partnerships (e.g., contracting workflow support, incentives/program tracking, coordination for launches).
  • Represent the team/portfolio where needed in partner forums or industry touchpoints (as aligned with the team).

Minimum Qualifications

  • Business Level proficieny in Mandarin, Japanese & English required
  • Partnerships / BD / Partner Management experience in technology ecosystems (messaging, SaaS, cPaaS, enterprise software, commerce, ad tech, or APIs), with proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders and priorities.
  • Strong capability in GTM execution, partner enablement, and operational rigor (tracking, follow-through, stakeholder alignment).
  • Demonstrated ability to analyze data, derive insights, and use them to guide decisions and partner actions.
  • Proven cross-functional collaboration skills (Product/Eng/Ops) and ability to drive resolution through influence.
  • High autonomy, strong organization, and clear communication in a fast-paced environment.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience driving growth via technology/product integrations, APIs, or platform partnerships.
  • Familiarity with messaging platform ecosystems and/or commerce platforms/marketplaces.
  • Comfortable engaging senior external stakeholders and communicating clearly with internal teams.

CEI No: R1223390 | License No: 07C3147

postedCompany.description: Salt is a global, award-winning digital recruitment agency, connecting people and businesses within Creative, Marketing, Sales, and Technology. Over 200 consultants are “Creating Futures” around the world and change the lives of 1000s of people each year by helping them to start new roles in some of the most exciting start-ups, scale ups, agencies or large global powerhouses. We cover permanent as well as contract roles and have offices in Auckland, Austin, Cape Town, Dubai, Johannesburg, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, London, Melbourne, New York, Singapore, and Sydney. Our services range from single hires to covering complete outsourcing solutions involving business change. We partner with our clients to find and place not only the best individual talent but also produce the most impressive and exciting digital teams across the globe. In New Zealand, our market coverage extends to Accounting & Finance, HR & Business Support, and Supply Chain & Operations. Salt recently acquired APAC-based specialist digital, tech, media, and sales firm, Xpand and talent agency Recruit Digital in South Africa in order to further increase our global talent services. Together with the new teams, we will have a stronger presence in the market as they join our vision in “Creating Futures” for our customers globally that will positively impact the digital economy. Whether you're looking for a new job or are hiring, get in touch!
postedCompany.name: SALT TALENT SEARCH PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
